page_metadata.biotools__summary: RazerS allows the user to align sequencing reads of arbitrary length using either the Hamming distance or the edit distance. The tool can work either lossless or with a user-defined loss rate at higher speeds.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RazerS allows the user to align sequencing reads of arbitrary length using either the Hamming distance or the edit distance. The tool can work either lossless or with a user-defined loss rate at higher speeds.
